title: melica frutescens
intro: Melica frutescens, also known as red fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Melica frutescens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. It is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be found in some herbal supplements and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
